events.title: Iran Warns Against Military Vessels Approaching Strait of Hormuz
events.desc: Iran's Revolutionary Guards declared that any military vessels approaching the Strait of Hormuz would be considered a violation of the U.S.-brokered ceasefire. They vowed to deal harshly and decisively with any such incursions, asserting Iran's control over the strategic waterway.

events.title: Trump Orders U.S. Naval Blockade of Strait of Hormuz
events.desc: Following the collapse of peace talks with Iran, President Donald Trump ordered a U.S. naval blockade of the Strait of Hormuz. This action signifies a significant escalation and tests the fragile ceasefire, with Trump stating the Navy would interdict vessels that have paid tolls to Iran.

events.title: Saudi Arabia Summons Iraq Envoy Over Drone Threats
events.desc: Saudi Arabia summoned Iraq's ambassador to protest drone threats originating from Iraqi territory targeting the kingdom and other Gulf states. Riyadh emphasized the need for Baghdad to responsibly address these attacks.

events.title: Israeli Strike Kills Infant Girl in South Lebanon
events.desc: An Israeli strike in south Lebanon killed an infant girl and other relatives during a funeral, amidst a new wave of attacks across the region. This incident occurred despite hopes of a truce spreading.

events.title: Iran's Asymmetric Counterair Campaign Intensifies
events.desc: Recent Iranian drone and missile attacks on Prince Sultan Air Base in Saudi Arabia destroyed an E-3 Sentry and damaged KC-135 tankers. These strikes are part of a broader pattern of Iran's asymmetric counterair campaign against U.S. and Israeli interests.
events.location: Prince Sultan Air Base, Saudi Arabia

events.title: US Scatters Mines Over Iranian Village
events.desc: Evidence suggests the U.S. deployed Gator Scatterable Mine systems over Kafari village near Shiraz, Iran, resulting in casualties. Experts identified the munitions as U.S.-made Gator anti-tank mines, indicating a new phase in the conflict.

events.title: Two Waves of Bombing at Iran School Compound
events.desc: New videos verify two missile strikes on an IRGC compound and an adjacent school in Minab, Iran. The footage, released by Iran's Ministry of Foreign Affairs, shows multiple impacts, detailing further damage from the conflict.

events.title: Israel Accused of Deadly Strike in South Lebanon
events.desc: Rescuers are searching through rubble after Israeli strikes across southern Lebanon killed at least 13 people. This follows a pattern of escalating attacks in the region.

events.title: At least 182 killed in Lebanon during Israeli strikes
events.desc: A large wave of Israeli strikes across Lebanon, including Beirut's southern suburbs and the eastern Bekaa Valley, resulted in at least 182 deaths and 890 injuries, according to the Lebanese health ministry. These attacks occurred hours after a U.S.-Iran ceasefire announcement.

events.title: Dozens Feared Dead in Air Strike in Northeastern Nigeria
events.desc: Amnesty International reports that over 100 people may have been killed in a military attack on a market in Jilli village, northeastern Nigeria, highlighting significant civilian casualties in regional conflicts.

events.title: Hungarian Government Passwords Exposed Online
events.desc: Approximately 800 Hungarian government email addresses and passwords have been leaked online, exposing vulnerabilities in ministries handling sensitive information. A Bellingcat analysis indicated widespread compromise across multiple ministries.

events.title: UAE Downplays Iranian Strikes
events.desc: Authorities in the United Arab Emirates have reportedly downplayed damage and mischaracterized interceptions of Iranian drone strikes. A review by Bellingcat suggests a discrepancy between official statements and open-source observations of Iranian attacks on the UAE.

events.title: Satellite Imagery Provider Restricts Iran Coverage
events.desc: Planet Labs has announced an indefinite restriction on satellite imagery coverage of Iran and parts of the Middle East, reportedly following U.S. pressure. This move limits open-source intelligence gathering capabilities in the region.

events.title: US-Iran Peace Talks End Without Deal
events.desc: High-stakes peace talks between the U.S. and Iran in Pakistan concluded without an agreement, dashing hopes for an immediate de-escalation. U.S. Vice President JD Vance departed empty-handed, highlighting the significant differences remaining between the two sides.

events.title: Gaza Aid Flotilla Aims to Break Israeli Blockade
events.desc: A flotilla of approximately 30 boats carrying humanitarian aid has set sail from Barcelona, Spain, aiming to break the Israeli blockade on Gaza. More vessels are expected to join the 'Global Sumud Flotilla' en route.
